name: Migom Global Corp.
summary: Migom Global Corp. focuses on building synergistic ventures in international banking, securities brokerage, electronic money distribution, digital assets origination and market making sectors. Previously, it provided video editing services to professional video production companies and private end consumers. The company was formerly known as Alfacourse Inc. and changed its name to Migom Global Corp. in November 2019. Migom Global Corp. was founded in 2016 and is based in New York, New York. Migom Global Corp. is a subsidiary of Heritage Equity Fund LP.
